title: AKJ SMP
description: AKJ SMP is a modpack adding many mods (Create, Supplementaries, etc.), while trying to keep the framerate high. It was originaly used by the private AKJ SMP.
body:
![The logo of the AKJ SMP. The 'A' is green. The 'K' is blue. The 'J' is red. The 'SMP' is golden.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9d205ef756270448ed45d2b1e4ed635aadb2b05.png)

## Introducing AKJ SMP!
This is the perfect 'Vanilla Plus' modpack. It adds many useful features, like the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) mod. This modpack was originally made for the private AKJ SMP.
## Why AKJ SMP?
The goal of Optimized Features is to have a modpack with all the nice mods to make a small kitchen sink modpack.
- make the game more beautiful
## Support or Issues?
If you have any problems, feature suggestions or other you can join my helpful [Discord](https://discord.gg/XGxBGrJjkA).
### Thanks
Big thanks to [Remarkably Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/remarkably) for many mods used in this modpack.
